Biography
Biography
Kutub Gandhi is a doctoral student at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University, advised by
Seth Cooper
. His doctoral research, which he began in 2020 and expects to complete in 2026, focuses on using games to promote critical thinking and abstract reasoning in education.
Gandhi’s interests took shape during his undergraduate career at Rice University, when he taught philosophy using games such as The Stanley Parable, The Talos Principle, and The Witness. He is affiliated with Game User Interaction and the Intelligence (GUII) Lab.
